prompt: A bold vintage propaganda-style poster with a limited red, black, and cream palette, printed on slightly textured aged paper. The composition shows 2 women in a dramatic action scene across the center: on the left, a woman with long wavy red hair in a white martial arts gi performs a very high side kick; on the right, a curvy woman in a black cowboy hat and a black lace bodysuit recoils and raises her arms defensively as the kick strikes her face. Use heavy black shadows, sharp angular shapes, screenprint-like ink coverage, and a graphic mid-century pulp poster aesthetic. Behind them, place a large diagonal red geometric banner spanning from upper left to lower right, plus 2 black speed lines on the left and 3 white speed lines on the right to emphasize motion. In the upper right corner, include a circular emblem with a stylized black-and-white screaming monkey or ape face inside a red disk. At the bottom, add oversized condensed block typography in an aggressive poster layout: the first line reads {argument name="headline text" default="SCOTTISH RECIPE:"} in red and black, and the second line reads {argument name="main title" default="MINCE AND TATTIES"} in very large red, white, and black letters over a black diagonal banner. Keep the overall look satirical, confrontational, retro, and highly graphic, like a fake exploitation movie poster or anarchic punk zine cover.
translatedPrompt: 一张大胆的复古宣传风格海报，采用红、黑、米色的有限配色方案，印在略带纹理的陈旧纸张上。构图中心展示了 2 名女性的戏剧性动作场景：左侧是一名留着红色长波浪卷发、身穿白色武术道服的女性，正做出一个极高的侧踢动作；右侧是一名身材曲线优美、戴着黑色牛仔帽并穿着黑色蕾丝连体衣的女性，在受到踢击时向后退缩并举起双臂防御。使用浓重的黑色阴影、锐利的几何形状、类似丝网印刷的油墨覆盖效果，以及 20 世纪中叶低俗小说海报的图形美学。在她们身后，放置一个从左上角延伸至右下角的巨大红色几何横幅，并在左侧添加 2 条黑色速度线，右侧添加 3 条白色速度线以强调动感。在右上角，包含一个圆形徽章，内部是一个红底的黑白风格尖叫猴子或猿猴面孔。在底部，以激进的海报布局添加超大号的压缩块状字体：第一行文字为 {argument name="headline text" default="SCOTTISH RECIPE:"}（红色和黑色），第二行文字为 {argument name="main title" default="MINCE AND TATTIES"}（在黑色斜向横幅上使用超大的红、白、黑三色字母）。保持整体外观具有讽刺性、对抗性、复古感和强烈的图形感，就像一张伪造的剥削电影海报或无政府主义朋克杂志封面。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古红色宣传风格格斗海报：此提示词可生成一张风格化的复古海报，画面中两名女性呈现出戏剧性的格斗姿态，并配有醒目的斜向排版，非常适合用于伪造低俗小说封面、讽刺海报或朋克风格的图形艺术创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: poster layout]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage, retro]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
